items.name: MU Student Health Center
items.notes: Primary care clinic for enrolled MU students. Same- or next-day appointments are almost always available. Handles illness, injuries, immunizations, lab work, and referrals. Walk-ins accepted for urgent concerns.

items.name: Counseling Center
items.location: 4th Floor, Strickland Hall | Main office: G202 MU Student Center
items.notes: Free mental health services for enrolled students. Offers brief individual therapy, ~20 group counseling and skills classes per semester, and emergency crisis support. Call 24/7 to speak with an on-call clinician. Appointments typically available within 72 hours.

items.name: Wellness Resource Center
items.notes: Offers well-being coaching for stress and sleep management, substance use support, guided meditation sessions, and wellness programming. A great first stop if you're feeling overwhelmed but aren't sure what kind of help you need.

items.name: RSVP Center (Relationship & Sexual Violence Prevention)
items.hours: Mon–Fri 8am–5pm | Crisis support: 24/7 via main line
items.notes: Confidential support for students affected by sexual assault, relationship violence, or stalking. Services include case management, advocacy, educational events, and consultation. All services are free for MU students.

items.name: MizzouRec (Student Recreation Complex)
items.location: 1 Rollins Field (800 Hitt St.), Columbia, MO 65211
items.notes: Full fitness facility included with student fees — no extra cost. Features cardio and weight rooms, indoor pools, a climbing wall, basketball and racquetball courts, group fitness classes, intramural leagues, and outdoor equipment rentals.

items.name: 24/7 Crisis Line (Counseling Center)
items.notes: Call any time and ask to speak with the on-call counselor for immediate crisis support. Always call 911 in a life-threatening emergency.

items.name: Crisis Text Line (National)
items.notes: Free, confidential crisis support via text message. Available 24/7. A good option if you need help but aren't able to make a phone call.
